name: Mexican Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Put shredded Swiss cheese into the prepared shells.
2. Mix cooked crumbled bacon with drained chopped green chilies and place into the shells.
3. Beat together eggs, light cream, and salt until well combined.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the shells over the bacon and chili mixture.
5. Sprinkle cayenne pepper evenly over the top of each quiche.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and allow cooling for 5 minutes before serving.
8. Makes 4 servings.
